subject: [PATCH v2 035/110] jffs2: use PRIino format for i_ino

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: The author is addressing a concern about the use of PRIino format for i_ino in jffs2 debug messages, specifically that it may not be portable to all architectures. The author responded by stating that they are aware of this issue and will consider adding architecture-specific code to handle the conversion.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the jffs2 file system to use the PRIino format for printing inode numbers, which will be widened in a future change via kino_t. It also corrects signed format specifiers to unsigned and removes unnecessary casts on i_ino. The changes are made across three files: dir.c, file.c, and fs.c.
